name: Bananas Fritas
recipeIngredient: 1 Pint Vanilla Ice Cream or 1 Cup Flavored Whipped Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the bananas and split each into 3 sections lengthwise.
2. Dip the banana sections into beer batter, shaking off excess batter.
3. Carefully slip the dipped banana sections into hot oil for deep-frying.
4. Cook on all sides until the batter is crisp and golden brown.
5. Remove from the oil using a slotted spoon and place on paper towels to drain excess oil.
6. Arrange the fried bananas on serving plates.
7. Sprinkle with lemon juice and honey.
8. Top with vanilla ice cream or flavored whipped cream and serve immediately.
If using whipped cream as a topping, flavor it slightly with sugar and almond extract before adding to the bananas.
